summary: Phase 3 testing complete - All new features working. Pet-Friendly Places Map with Leaflet, geocoding, and Overpass API search fully functional. All 12 species and 19 registries supported. Elegant certificate document with gold borders, seal, and pedigree section working. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All features tested and working.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for new features
Leaflet map loads correctly with OpenStreetMap tiles
Overpass API integration working - returns real pet stores, vets, parks data
Nominatim geocoding working correctly for US locations
Certificate document has elegant gold borders, ornate corners, and professional seal
Pedigree section displays Sire and Dam information correctly
All 12 species available in pet creation and certificate registration
All 19 registries available in breeder credential form
seed_data_creation: Test certificates created during pytest (prefixed with TEST_). Exotic species certificate (Sugar Glider) created to verify all-species support.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 complete. New features tested: 1) Pet-Friendly Places Map with Leaflet, geocoding (Nominatim), and place search (Overpass API) - returns 28+ pet stores and 31+ vets in Miami area, 2) All 12 species support (dog, cat, bird, horse, rabbit, reptile, fish, hamster, ferret, guinea_pig, exotic, other), 3) All 19 registries support (AKC, CKC, UKC, FCI, KC, TICA, CFA, GCCF, ACF, AFA, ABS, AQHA, APHA, USEF, ARBA, BRC, USARK, ANKC, Other), 4) Elegant certificate document with gold borders, ornate corners, Petbookin seal (stamp variant), and pedigree section. Admin has credentials from TICA, AFA, AQHA, ARBA, USARK.

map_page.notes: Leaflet map loads, search input, 5 place type filters (Veterinarians, Pet Stores, Dog Parks, Groomers, Parks)

places_search_api.notes: Returns 28 pet stores in Miami area via Overpass API

all_species_support.notes: 12 species available: dog, cat, bird, horse, rabbit, reptile, fish, hamster, ferret, guinea_pig, exotic, other

all_registries_support.notes: 19 registries available: AKC, CKC, UKC, FCI, KC, TICA, CFA, GCCF, ACF, AFA, ABS, AQHA, APHA, USEF, ARBA, BRC, USARK, ANKC, Other

elegant_certificate_document.notes: Gold borders, ornate corners, Petbookin seal (stamp variant), pedigree section with Sire/Dam

sidebar_pet_map_link.notes: Pet Map link under Feeds section in sidebar

pet_of_the_week.notes: Banner shows Max the Golden Retriever

certificates_page.notes: Register Pet, Register Litter, Transfer buttons working. MEGA tier = all free
